title: Non Stick Cooking Pots with Glass Lid – 7.4 Quart Induction Hob Stock Pot – Kitchen Deep Casserole Cookware – 28cm, Cream – by Nuovva
features: ROBUST CORE DESIGN: Built for durability and consistent performance, this stockpot by Nuovva features a solid core that heats quickly and evenly. It handles high-volume cooking with ease while resisting warping and wear. A dependable choice for everyday meals or big-batch cooking!

TIMELESS CREAM EXTERIOR: The smooth cream-colored finish brings a calm, neutral elegance to your kitchen. Its subtle tone pairs beautifully with modern, farmhouse, or traditional decor styles. More than just stylish, the finish is scratch-resistant and designed to maintain its splendour over time!

SMOOTH NON-STICK INTERIOR: Cooking and cleanup are hassle-free thanks to the PFOA-free non-stick interior coating of our premium stockpot. Foods glide out of the pot effortlessly with no sticking, scraping, or soaking required. Ideal for everything from hearty soups to delicate sauces!

DEEP CAPACITY: This pot’s generous 28cm depth offers ample room for boiling, braising, and slow cooking without crowding ingredients. Great for family dinners, meal prep, or hosting, the tall walls help reduce mess and spatter. It’s your go-to when cooking large portions with ease!

STOVETOP VERSATILITY: Safe for use on all stovetops—including induction, the cream stockpot by Nuovva includes a vented glass lid which allows you to check progress while locking in heat and moisture!
description: Product Description Upgrade your kitchen with NUOVVA’s durable non-stick casserole pots.
